name: @dinhtungdu/tangerine
description: Local background coding agent platform with ACP agents and web dashboard

scripts.build:cli: bun build packages/server/src/cli/index.ts --target bun --outfile dist/cli.js --external 'bun:*' --external bun-pty --external effect --external hono --external 'hono/*' --external zod
scripts.check: bun run --filter '*' check && bun run lint
scripts.test: bun run --filter tangerine-server test && bun run --filter tangerine-web test
